title: The Captain from Köpenick
actors: Heinz Rühmann, Martin Held, Hannelore Schroth
plot: A young shoemaker is arrested for stealing a small amount of money, and is released after being jailed for 15 years. He wants to have a pass to get a job and start anew, but without a job he doesn't get a pass; and without a pass,...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 11 wins & 4 nominations total
